posts.author: SunnySideUp_7
posts.text: Has anyone else noticed how @pixel_artist_12 is getting absolutely swarmed lately? It's not just comments, they're being mass-reported for 'spam' within minutes of posting. I checked their profile and it's a small account with 400 followers but the report queue is huge. Someone's definitely coordinating this to get them banned. Please check if there's a pattern before acting.
posts.explanation: This case involves potential coordinated brigading requiring investigation into whether reports are genuine violations or part of a harassment campaign.
